title: Law Enforcement Data Service: equality impact assessment 2025
body: "The Law Enforcement Data Service (LEDs) is a critical national infrastructure service which will replace the long-standing Police National Computer (PNC) in 2026.  It is the second iteration of a LEDS equality impact assessment, the first being published in 2024.  This iteration focuses on developments since then including both internal and external factors to the programme.  Related information  Law Enforcement Data Service child rights impact assessment - GOV.UK "
